item.title: Companies struggle to price sustainability
item.description: Regulation has not translated into a financial understanding of a sustainability strategy, KPMG says
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: Scaling adaptation solutions requires ‘broader’ action across economy, says Gfanz
item.description: Governments play a ‘catalytic’ role in addressing barriers that private finance cannot tackle alone, finds report
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: Biggest reinsurers taking ‘insufficient’ steps or backsliding on climate commitments
item.description: The five biggest reinsurers have ‘limited’ LNG restrictions, or none at all, finds Insure Our Future
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: Natural systems as important as major banks for economic stability
item.description: More than $1tn of annual GDP in Europe, China and the US depends on forest-linked rainfall
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: Investors not facing up to financial and trade risks from deforestation
item.description: Almost 60% of financial institutions do not have a policy to limit deforestation
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: Tech investors are playing catch-up on data centre diligence
item.description: Hyperscaler investors are learning to ask the kinds of questions that mining and agriculture investors have been asking for years
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: Funding of petrochemicals industry highly concentrated among few financial institutions
item.description: Banks and investors have a ‘vested interest’ in profitability and long-term continuity of the sector, says the Center for International Environmental Law
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: International net zero standard suggests prioritising emissions reductions over reporting
item.description: Draft ISO incorporates equity and justice into standard setting, proposing different corporate pathways for different markets
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views

item.title: Biodiversity investing: different by design
item.description: An impact strategy focused on biodiversity lowers exposure to megacap technology names that dominate global indices
item.dc:creator: Sustainable Views
